key_needs: Chicken breast (2 lbs) or turkey if cheaper
summary: Weekly household order for the Williams household with a $180 total budget. Must-haves include poultry (chicken breast 2 lbs or turkey if cheaper), fresh produce (spinach, cherry tomatoes, avocados), grains/oils (brown rice, olive oil), and dairy-free items (dairy-free Greek yogurt, unsweetened almond milk). Staples: black beans, chickpeas, medium salsa, oats. Household supplies: paper towels, dish soap, kitchen trash bags. Preferences: avoid artificial fragrances; prefer eco-friendly packaging; avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy/tofu, and cow’s milk. Use household card ending 4821; for substitutions email kesha.williams@example.com.
